category_sources: source_facts.description identifies csprecon as a tool to discover target domains using Content Security Policy.
source_facts.homepage points to the official csprecon GitHub repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official repository use the csprecon display name.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for csprecon.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/edoardottt/csprecon; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CSP-based domain reconnaissance CLI.
